CLOSE EDITOR Phone format: (213) 555-0196 Area format: Los Angeles County | Hood cleaning Appears on customer link and PDF LOGO AND REPORT COLOR The report color is just the accent line and button color on the restaurant link/PDF. Pick the color closest to your truck, logo, or website. COMPANY LOGO AQH UPLOAD LOGO Appears on the restaurant link and PDF. PNG, JPG, or WebP under 400 KB. REPORT COLOR This does not change the whole app. It only marks your customer report with one company color. ORANGE BLACK GREEN BLUE RED CUSTOM COLOR RESTAURANT REPORT PREVIEW AQH Axis1 Qa 1779169153943 Hood Cleaning Service area / kitchen exhaust service Service report prepared by Technician / crew Customer phone axis1.qa.1779169153943@example.com Service license / certification COMPANY NAME Appears at the top of every restaurant report.
